zh.lifeSummary: 當Florence Molineux於1408年出生在英國藍卡爾梅林時，她的父親Robert Molyneux48歲，母親Alice Norreys29歲。她於1422年與John de Lacy在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年4月11日在英國越可爾素萊安享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Florence Molineux于1408年出生在英国藍卡爾梅林时，她的父亲Robert Molyneux48岁，母亲Alice Norreys29岁。她于1422年与John de Lacy在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年4月11日在英国越可爾素萊安享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molineux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Molyneux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

nameMeanings.name: Florence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

variants.name: Florance
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

en.lifeSummary: When Florence Molineux was born in 1408, in Melling, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert Molyneux, was 48 and her mother, Alice Norreys, was 29. She married John de Lacy in 1422, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 April 1442, in Southowram, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Florence Molineux est née en 1408, à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Molyneux, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice Norreys, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John de Lacy en 1422, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1442, à Southowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Sie hat 1422 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John de Lacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. April 1442 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Southowram, Yorkshire, England.

Lei sposato John de Lacy nel 1422, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Florence Molineuxが1408年にイギリスランカシュアイアメリングで生まれた時，父Robert Molyneuxは48歳，母Alice Norreysは29歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn de Lacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年4月11日にイギリスヨークシュアイアソウソウラムで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Florence Molineux(이)가 1408년 영국 랭카실르 멜링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Molyneux(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Norreys(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 John de Lacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 4월 11일 영국 요르크실르 소우토램에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Florence Molineux родилась в 1408 г. в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Molyneux было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Norreys, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Lacy в 1422 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 апреля 1442 г. в местности соутоурам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.
